hero.subtitle: ABOUT ACADEMY
hero.title: Gandhinagar Sports Academy
hero.description: Why choose Gandhinagar Sports Academy? Because here, dreams take shape without compromise. We help athletes excel in sports while achieving academic success with world-class facilities and expert coaching.

items.description: To provide professional cricket coaching and create opportunities for young players to grow into confident and skilled cricketers.
To become one of the most trusted cricket academies in Gujarat for developing future professional players.
To provide a safe and supportive environment for players to grow and excel in cricket.

directorsMessage.text: At Gandhinagar Sports Academy, we believe sports build character. Cricket teaches discipline, patience and teamwork. Our aim is to provide the right platform for young players to develop their skills and confidence.
directorsMessage.subText: We welcome all passionate students who want to learn and grow in cricket.

founders.sectionSubtitle: The people behind Gandhinagar Sports Academy

list.title: Inception
list.description: Founded with a vision to revolutionize sports training.

list.title: First State Champions
list.description: Our athletes won their first state-level championships, marking the beginning of our legacy of excellence.

list.title: Facility Expansion
list.description: Major expansion of facilities including new courts, swimming pool, and modern training equipment to international standards.

list.title: National Recognition
list.description: GSA athletes represented India at international competitions, bringing home medals and recognition for the academy.

list.title: Coaching Excellence
list.description: Introduced advanced coaching programs with certified international coaches and sports science support.

list.title: Digital Transformation
list.description: Launched online training modules and athlete performance tracking systems to enhance training effectiveness.

list.title: Expansion
list.description: Extended facilities to include modern cricket nets and fitness centers.
